name: Savvycal
description: Savvycal — Developer-friendly scheduling tool with API, embeddable booking pages, and side-by-side calendar overlay.

seo.title: Savvycal — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Savvycal: Savvycal — Developer-friendly scheduling tool with API, embeddable booking pages, and side-by-side calendar overlay.

when_to_use: Developer-friendly scheduling API with rich REST docs
Side-by-side calendar overlay for easy time picking
Embeddable booking page for SaaS customer calls
Webhook integration for post-booking CRM automation
Personal scheduling tool with API for automation needs

review.verdict: The nicest scheduler for developers and small teams; Calendly still dominates when enterprise SSO matters.
review.best_for: Indie founders and consultants scheduling client calls
review.not_for: Enterprises requiring deep SSO and compliance controls

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
